text_first_visit: You arrive in a compact entry chamber. A satchel hangs beside the exit.

interactables.name: Travel Satchel
interactables.text_on_interact: Inside are a portal scroll and a note about surviving the trial.

effects.text: After you clear the trial, return to this first chamber when it is safe — you can retreat to town from here without using a portal. Keep the scroll for emergencies or deeper realms.
